zh.Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales: 威爾士格拉莫爾根拉迪爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margred Verch Cynwrig Fychan於1214年出生在英國威爾斯福林爾時，她的父親Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr40歲，母親Angharad verch Lewys39歲。她於大約1231年與Iorwerth ap Griffri在英國威爾斯可爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales: 威尔士格拉莫爾根拉迪爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margred Verch Cynwrig Fychan于1214年出生在英国威尔斯福林爾时，她的父亲Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr40岁，母亲Angharad verch Lewys39岁。她于大约1231年与Iorwerth ap Griffri在英国威尔斯可爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Margred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Margred Verch Cynwrig Fychan was born in 1214, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr, was 40 and her mother, Angharad verch Lewys, was 39. She married Iorwerth ap Griffri about 1231, in Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margred Verch Cynwrig Fychan est née en 1214, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Angharad verch Lewys, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Iorwerth ap Griffri environ 1231, à Clwyd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margred Verch Cynwrig Fychan 1214 in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr 40 und ihre Mutter Angharad verch Lewys 39. Sie hat um 1231 in Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom Iorwerth ap Griffri geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margred Verch Cynwrig Fychan è nata il nel 1214 nel Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Angharad verch Lewys, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Iorwerth ap Griffri circa 1231, nel Clwyd, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli.

ja.Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales: ウェールズグラモーガンラディル
ja.lifeSummary: Margred Verch Cynwrig Fychanが1214年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアで生まれた時，父Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyrは40歳，母Angharad verch Lewysは39歳であった。約1231年にイギリスウェールズクルウイドでIorwerth ap Griffriと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Margred Verch Cynwrig Fychan(이)가 1214년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Angharad verch Lewys(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1231년 영국 웨일스 클w이드에서 Iorwerth ap Griffri(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margred Verch Cynwrig Fychan nasceu em 1214, em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Angharad verch Lewys, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Iorwerth ap Griffri aproximadamente 1231, em Clwyd, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margred Verch Cynwrig Fychan родилась в 1214 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad verch Lewys, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Iorwerth ap Griffri около 1231 г. в местности клвид, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margred Verch Cynwrig Fychan nació en 1214, en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Angharad verch Lewys, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Iorwerth ap Griffri aproximadamente 1231, en Clwyd, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos.
